scripts.predev: powershell -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8012 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:api: powershell -Command "$appDir = if (Test-Path '.\\web\\main.py') { '.' } elseif (Test-Path '.\\main.py') { '..' } else { '.' }; python -m uvicorn web.main:app --app-dir $appDir --reload --port 8012"
